nasb.text: The men of Babylon made Succoth-benoth, the men of Cuth made Nergal, the men of Hamath made Ashima,

esv.text: The men of Babylon made Succoth-benoth, the men of Cuth made Nergal, the men of Hamath made Ashima,

cnv.text: 巴比倫人做了疏割．比訥像，古他人做了匿甲像，哈馬人做了亞示瑪像，

ccb.text: 巴比伦人造疏割·比讷神像，古他人造匿甲神像，哈马人造亚示玛神像，
